content:
👋 Hi, I'm Abasiubong Esinwo

Hello DEV Community!

My name is Abasiubong Esinwo, and I'm a Full Stack Developer from Nigeria.

I enjoy building modern web applications using technologies like:

• React

• Node.js

• Express.js

• MongoDB

• JavaScript

• TypeScript

I'm currently building a Restaurant Management System and working on improving my backend architecture, API development, and software engineering skills.

I'll be sharing:

• My learning journey

• Projects I'm building

• Tips I discover

• Coding challenges

• Lessons from real-world development

I'm excited to learn from this amazing community.

Thanks for reading, and feel free to connect with me!

Happy coding! 🚀
